//: Per-title runtime dependencies (system extensions the OS needs but doesn't bundle). A title declares `requires:[<dep-id>]` (a compatibility facet); a build installs each required dep into every System Folder whose name matches the dep's `install_os`, sourcing the files verbatim from a reservoir donor. OS versions NOT listed in `install_os` either bundle the dep already or predate it — so they're left untouched. Bundled + embedded; user overrides live in ~/.macatrium.json ("dependencies": {...}).

sound-manager-3.name: Sound Manager 3.0
sound-manager-3.note: Async/multi-channel Sound Manager (Apple, 1993). System 7.5+ bundle it in the System file (skip); System 6.0.x keep their built-in enhanced Sound Manager from 6.0.7 and predate the System-7 Extensions architecture (skip); only 7.0/7.1/7.1.x ship the older 2.x Sound Manager and need this Extension. satisfied_if: a base that already carries a Sound Manager Extension (e.g. one bundling QuickTime 4's modern Sound Manager) is left untouched.

quicktime.name: QuickTime
quicktime.note: Placeholder. Titles that play QuickTime movies (e.g. Spectre VR's intro/wall .mov files) need QuickTime + its Power/Sound support. The QuickTime-4 base already ships it in 7.1/7.5.5/7.6.1 (satisfied). install_os is empty (a no-op) until/unless a base without it needs the extension staged in the reservoir.
